description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in black from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 74cmWidth: 34cmDepth: 16cmMade of synthetic leather for durability, quilted with floral pattern for high-fashion styleHas two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pocketsTwo short handles attached to the bag with metal loops, alternate long strap providedZipped pocket on front with plaited embellishmentsZipped pockets on back and sidesRound metal zip pulls for style and ease of useCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
